Name: Dollymix Studios
Description: Dollymix Studios is a streetwear brand founded in 2018. We recently reimagined the visual identity of the brand to realign with the founders tastes. The Hasbro Logo from 1978 was the original reference for this project. This was referenced as gaming manufactures often have mature and simple visual identities, but produce games that inspire fun and excitement every single day. In this context, Dollymix facilitates play' in the form of providing the garments which are fairly simplistic but therefore allow people to create in every day.

Name: Just Looking
Description: Introducing Just Looking, an Audio-Visual Diary by Rohan Misra and Sam Ratcliffe. The act of filming is an inherently mindful exercise. It forces you to slow down and experience what’s happening in front of you, even if it’s nothing of any particular consequence. Just Looking is an audiovisual diary comprised of moments and spaces that we have collected throughout our time here, occasionally using audio pairing to utilise the link between music and memory in our brains. We encourage you to stop what you’re doing and enjoy the pleasure of just looking 🧘‍♂️

Name: MintStars
Description: MintStars is a web3 startup in the private creator space. They hired us to update their branding assets to feel more bright, modern and trusting. We began by changing typeface to make it more recognisable and also embraced lowercasing throughout their whole brand identity. We reimagined the colour palette from pastel shades to more saturated, contrasting tones to improve brand memorability.

Name: [NDA] Digital Streaming Platform
Description: I was commissioned to reimagine the UI and UX for a startup Digital Streaming Platform [currently under NDA], which offers unique artist experiences (e.g. free concert tickets) to deepen the connection and incentivise genuine engagement between the artist and the fan. As part of my work I interviewed a target user group to deeper understand their behaviours, needs and desires from a new streaming platform. After multiple iterations, I used user testing and hot mapping to optimise my design.

Name: New Beginning EP Listening Party
Description: Dollymix Studios presents: New Beginning EP Listening Party Sillyro’s musical influences are a product of the music that him and his friends love listening to together, so in the road to the release of his debut EP we hosted a listening party at the studio where Dollymix was born. Five unique sets from friends were captured over the course of the evening, reflecting sounds that be heard on the EP, ranging from vinyl house grooves to euphoric breaks. The project is currently live and set videos are released weekly throughout April in the build up to the EP launch.
Deliverables:
• Event organisation & management
  • Full set videos (YouTube)
  • Short form clips (Instagram / Tiktok)
  • Set audio (SoundCloud)

Name: Off Licence Clobber
Description: Off Licence is a streetwear brand featuring ironic 3rd party graphic t-shirts for students to represent their University city. The Off Licence Clobber logo is referenced off of the 'Costco' logo. As most UK University student are notoriously strapped for cash, the budget wholesaler is a brand that the target market can identify with, whilst inspiring a degree of humour and irony due to it's hyper-commercial nature.

Name: The Riddle Festival Stage
Description: The Riddle is a brand new venue featuring at Wilderness Festival 2024. I worked with them to create a brand identity to help realise their vision. The client had a wide range of visual references which needed tying together. For example, the first room at their festival stage is based on a Moroccan speakeasy, featuring handwoven fabrics with a nomadic style; quite lowkey and tactile. On the other hand, the second room transitions into an enchanting and vibrant wonderland filled with blossoming plants, so we needed to strike a balance between something understated and warming which yet inspired an excitement for something more. To achieve this, we explored colour palettes and patterns from Moroccan fabrics, as well styles and imagery were referenced from old circus promotional material.
Deliverables:
• Brand Identity
  • Festival Lineup Poster
  • Performer Artist Social Media Cards
  • Promotional Motion Graphic

Name: Wing.io
Description: Wing.io is a tech startup aiming to digitise the traditional paper business card. They hired us to design the user interface (UI) for their SaaS platform, which features an admin dashboard used by organisations to track sales representatives. The design was recently pitched to Morgan Stanley.
